title: The Ethics of Research - Comprehensive Quiz

questions.question: What drives research should be our desire to benefit ________, not just our own success.
Research ethics are guidelines for the responsible conduct of research which educates and monitors researchers to ensure:
Research ethics promotes the aim of research, such as expanding:
Which ethical principle requires informing participants about the criteria set for choosing them and that participation will be completely voluntary?
The principle of ________ requires being truthful in all scientific communications and not misleading colleagues, research sponsors, or the public.
Which ethical principle requires avoiding bias and maintaining objectivity in all parts and steps of the research?
What should be disclosed if it may affect your research according to the principle of Objectivity?
options: Conflicts of personal or financial interest

questions.question: The principle of ________ requires fulfilling and adhering to your promises and agreements, and being consistent with your thoughts and actions.
Which ethical principle states that you should never plagiarize or 'copy-and-paste' other authors' work for your own?
Respect for Intellectual Property requires honoring all forms of intellectual property rights, including:
Which ethical principle involves practicing responsible sharing of data, results, ideas, and resources?
The principle of ________ requires preserving confidentiality agreements and not disclosing confidential information such as papers submitted for publication.
Which ethical principle requires conducting research with social and environmental welfare, safety, and protection in mind?
The principle of ________ states that you should not discriminate against anyone based on gender, race, ethnicity, etc.
Which ethical principle requires understanding and not violating laws and government policies?
Human Subject Protection requires respecting and protecting the welfare, interest, privacy, dignity, and ________ of human subjects.
Which vulnerable populations are mentioned as needing special precautions in Human Subject Protection?
Animal Care requires being responsible and humane when using animals for research. What should NOT be performed?
options: Scientifically irrelevant or poorly designed experiments

questions.question: Which ethical principle states that research results should be published to improve knowledge and solve problems for the benefit of society?
Responsible Publication requires publishing research results for the benefit of society, not to fulfill ________ or just to advance your own career.
Which ethical principle involves helping to educate, mentor, and advise others, and promoting their welfare?
The principle of ________ requires always respecting colleagues and treating them fairly.
Which ethical principle requires avoiding careless errors and negligence, and carefully examining your work and the work of peers?
The principle of Carefulness requires keeping good records of:
Which ethical principle requires maintaining and improving professional competence and expertise through lifelong education and learning?
According to the PDF, how many ethical principles are discussed?
Which of the following is NOT one of the learning objectives stated in the PDF?
options: To understand ethics in higher studies
To comprehend the principle of being a true scholar
To appreciate the value of intellectual and moral honesty
To learn how to publish research quickly

questions.question: The principle of Honesty requires NEVER doing which of the following?
Informed Consent requires informing participants about the schedule of:
options: One-on-one interview at their convenient time

questions.question: The principle of ________ requires observing precautions to protect vulnerable populations and studying international standards of ethical practice.
